close_reason: Implemented Solidity dependency extractor using tree-sitter with tree-sitter-solidity 1.2.13. Detects external libraries like @openzeppelin/contracts and internal relative imports. Fixed ABI compatibility by upgrading tree-sitter to 0.25.
description: Implement Solidity extractor using solang-parser or solc. Parse import statements. Map to solidity-deps.toml entries. Output extraction protocol JSON.
title: Solidity dependency extractor
